name: Brown Basmati Lemon Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped Fresh Parsley, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice and soak it in cold water for 20 minutes.
2. Add all ingredients except parsley to a 2-quart pot.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then lower heat and stir.
4. Simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until water is absorbed and rice is cooked.
5. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Note: This can also be made with white Basmati rice. For variation, add half cup cooked lentils, half teaspoon chopped fresh parsley, and lemon juice to taste. Serving size approximately 5 cups; 118 calories; 1 gram fat; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 3.7 milligrams sodium.
